title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves 2 Dead
summary: A planned fight at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in a mass shooting, leaving two dead and several wounded.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and the need for community safety measures in public spaces.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host the 2026 Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 in Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Promotes advancements in polymer technology and provides educational opportunities for industry professionals.

title: Missing 70-Year-Old Hunter Found Safe in Lancaster County
summary: Authorities successfully located a missing 70-year-old hunter in Lancaster County after a three-day search.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the effectiveness of search and rescue operations and brings relief to the community.

title: Suspect Rams Deputy, Leads Chase in Mooresville
summary: A traffic stop in Mooresville escalated when a driver rammed a deputy and led police on a chase. Crack cocaine was found.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the dangers faced by law enforcement and the prevalence of drug-related crime.

title: CMPD Arrests Four, Seizes Multiple Firearms
summary: A traffic stop by Charlotte-Mecklenburg Police resulted in the arrest of four individuals and the seizure of four firearms.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about illegal firearms and the potential for violence in the community.

title: Large Meth Seizure During Cabarrus County Traffic Stop
summary: Nearly 80 pounds of methamphetamine were seized during a traffic stop in Cabarrus County. An ICE detainer was issued.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing battle against drug trafficking and its impact on local communities.

title: Rain and Storms Expected Late Wednesday
summary: The Charlotte area is expecting rain and possible storms late Wednesday, with cooler temperatures on Friday.
charlotte_impact: Provides essential weather information for residents to prepare for potential disruptions.

title: School Bus Crash in University City Injures One
summary: A crash involving a school bus in the University City area resulted in one injury. It is unclear if students were on board.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about student safety and the potential risks associated with school transportation.

title: Fatal Motorcycle Crash in University City
summary: An overnight motorcycle crash at North Tryon Street and University City Boulevard resulted in one fatality.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the dangers of motorcycle riding and the importance of road safety.

title: Charlotte Man Faces 43 Charges for Vehicle Break-Ins
summary: A Charlotte man faces 43 charges related to vehicle break-ins in Lincoln County, involving theft of firearms and electronics.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the issue of property crime and its impact on residents' sense of security.

title: Deputies Search for Missing Teen in Catawba County
summary: The Catawba County Sheriff's Office is searching for a missing 15-year-old, last seen in Conover early Friday.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the vulnerability of young people and the importance of community support in search efforts.

title: Weather Alert: Severe Weather Possible Wednesday Night
summary: Charlotte faces a risk of heavy rain and severe weather Wednesday night into Thursday.
charlotte_impact: Alerts residents to potential hazards and encourages preparedness for adverse weather conditions.

title: Teen Charged with Murder in Chesterfield County Shooting
summary: An 18-year-old faces a murder charge after a fatal shooting in Chesterfield County. A fourth suspect has been arrested.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the issue of youth violence and the tragic consequences of gun-related incidents.

title: SC Lawmakers to Unveil 'Logan's Law' for Violent Offenders
summary: Federal lawmakers will introduce "Logan's Law," proposing a public registry for violent offenders.
charlotte_impact: Aims to prevent future tragedies by tracking violent offenders and improving public safety measures.

title: Mecklenburg Considers Housing for Teachers
summary: Mecklenburg commissioners are considering converting a former school property into housing prioritizing teachers.
charlotte_impact: Supports educators and addresses the need for affordable housing in the community.
